query: Change the turbulence model from Spalart-Allmaras to kOmegaSST
description: In the 'RAS' dictionary of turbulenceProperties, change 'RASModel' from SpalartAllmaras to kOmegaSST.

query: Increase the simulation end time to 0.005 seconds
description: Modify the endTime parameter in controlDict to extend simulation duration.

query: Adjust the mesh resolution to have 100 cells in x-direction, 50 in y, and 25 in z
description: Change the mesh cell distribution in blockMeshDict for all three spatial directions.

query: Set the maximum Courant number to 0.3
description: Modify maxCo parameter in controlDict to control time step size.

query: Change the explosive density to 1700 kg/m³
description: Update rho0 parameter in the explosive phase properties.

query: Modify the equivalence ratio to 0.9
description: Change the fuel-to-oxidizer ratio in combustion properties.

query: Increase the write interval to output results every 1e-4 seconds
description: Adjust writeInterval in controlDict for more frequent data output.

query: Set the laminar flame speed (Su) to 0.5 m/s
description: Modify the Su parameter in combustion properties.

query: Change the maximum refinement level to 4 for adaptive mesh refinement
description: Update maxRefinement parameter in dynamicMeshDict.

query: Modify the explosive charge location to center at (1.0, 0.5, 0.5)
description: Change the sphereToCell or boxToCell center coordinates in setFieldsDict.

query: Switch from kOmegaSST to kEpsilon turbulence model
description: Change RASModel in turbulenceProperties to use the k-epsilon model.

query: Set the window burst pressure threshold to 50 kPa
description: Modify pBurst parameter for breakable window boundaries.

query: Change particle diameter to 2 millimeters in the particle phase
description: Update the diameter parameter in particle phase properties.

query: Set initial velocity field to 500 m/s in x-direction for the moving cone
description: Modify velocity boundary condition in the U field file.

query: Disable turbulence modeling and use laminar flow
description: Change simulationType from RAS to laminar in turbulenceProperties.

query: Change the equation of state for the explosive from perfectGas to JWL
description: Switch to Jones-Wilkins-Lee EOS model with appropriate parameters for better explosive modeling.

query: Use stiffenedGas EOS for air instead of perfectGas
description: Change air phase equation of state to better model high-pressure conditions.

query: Switch combustion reaction model from laminar flame speed to Arrhenius kinetics
description: Replace Su-based model with chemical kinetics using activation energy and pre-exponential factor.

query: Change thermodynamic model from perfectThermo to eConst
description: Simplify to constant specific heat model by modifying thermo dictionary.

query: Use JANAF tables for more accurate air thermodynamic properties
description: Replace simplified thermo model with JANAF polynomial-based properties.

query: Change window material model from linearElastic to elasticPlastic
description: Enable plastic deformation simulation for window structures.

query: Switch window fracture criterion from pressure-based to principal strain
description: Use strain-based failure instead of pBurst pressure threshold.

query: Change convection scheme from vanAlbada to MUSCL for higher accuracy
description: Modify numerical scheme in fvSchemes for improved shock resolution.

query: Switch flux limiter from vanAlbada to vanLeer
description: Change the TVD limiter used in convection schemes.

query: Use Gidaspow drag model instead of SchillerNaumann for particle-gas interaction
description: Change drag model in multiphase flow to better handle dense particle regions.

query: Set interfacial heat transfer model to RanzMarshall
description: Specify heat transfer correlation between phases.

query: Change granular viscosity model from Syamlal to HrenyaSinclair
description: Modify particle phase rheology model in turbulenceProperties.

query: Use SinclairJackson radial distribution function for particle collisions
description: Change the radial distribution model affecting particle-particle interactions.

query: Change the explosive EOS to BKW (Becker-Kistiakowsky-Wilson)
description: Switch to BKW equation of state with appropriate coefficients.

query: Apply viscoElastic material model to window structures
description: Enable time-dependent deformation behavior for structural elements.

query: Increase simulation time and reduce time step by setting maxCo to 0.2 and endTime to 0.01
description: Modify both time control parameters for more stable long-duration simulation.

query: Refine mesh to 200x100x50 cells and increase maxRefinement to 3
description: Improve spatial resolution through both base mesh and adaptive refinement.

query: Change explosive properties: density to 1650 kg/m³ and use JWL equation of state
description: Modify both density and EOS for more realistic explosive modeling.

query: Adjust combustion model: equivalence ratio to 1.1 and Su to 0.6 m/s
description: Modify multiple combustion parameters for richer fuel mixture.

query: Configure output: writeInterval 5e-5, write format binary, and compression on
description: Set multiple output control parameters for efficient data storage.

query: Setup window failure: pBurst 40 kPa and elasticPlastic material with yield stress 300 MPa
description: Configure both fracture threshold and material plasticity.

query: Change turbulence to kEpsilon and adjust combustion to use Arrhenius kinetics
description: Modify both turbulence model and chemical reaction modeling approach.

query: Set particle properties: diameter 1.5 mm and use Gidaspow drag model
description: Adjust particle size and inter-phase drag correlation.

query: Improve numerical accuracy: use MUSCL scheme and reduce maxCo to 0.3
description: Enhance solution quality through better discretization and time step control.

query: Move explosive charge to (0.8, 0.5, 0.5) with radius 0.15 m and set initial pressure to 5 MPa
description: Adjust both geometric position and initial field values for explosive.

query: Switch explosive modeling to use JWL EOS and Arrhenius reaction kinetics
description: Apply advanced physics models for both thermodynamics and chemistry.

query: Configure multiphase drag and heat transfer: Gidaspow drag and RanzMarshall heat transfer
description: Set up inter-phase momentum and energy exchange models.

query: Change granular flow models: HrenyaSinclair viscosity and SinclairJackson radial distribution
description: Update multiple particle phase rheology models.

query: Use high-resolution schemes: MUSCL convection with vanLeer limiter
description: Configure advanced numerical methods for shock capturing.

query: Setup structural response: elasticPlastic material with principal strain fracture at 0.05
description: Configure advanced material and failure models for structures.
